CustomField.formula: CASE( State__c, "HARYANA","NORTH", "HIMACHAL PRADESH","NORTH", "JAMMU & KASHMIR","NORTH", "PUNJAB","NORTH", "RAJASTHAN","NORTH", "UTTAR PRADESH","NORTH", "UTTARAKHAND","NORTH", "CHANDIGARH","NORTH", "DELHI","NORTH", "ARUNACHAL PRADESH","EAST", "ASSAM","EAST", "BIHAR","EAST", "JHARKHAND","EAST", "MANIPUR","EAST", "MEGHALAYA","EAST", "MIZORAM","EAST", "NAGALAND","EAST", "ODISHA","EAST", "SIKKIM","EAST", "TRIPURA","EAST", "WEST BENGAL","EAST", "ANDAMAN & NICOBAR ISLANDS","EAST", "CHATTISGARH","WEST", "GOA","WEST", "GUJARAT","WEST", "MADHYA PRADESH","WEST", "MAHARASHTRA","WEST", "DADRA & NAGAR HAVELI","WEST", "DAMAN AND DIU","WEST", "LAKSHADWEEP","WEST", "ANDHRA PRADESH","SOUTH", "KARNATAKA","SOUTH", "KERALA","SOUTH", "TAMIL NADU","SOUTH", "TELANGANA","SOUTH", "PONDICHERRY","SOUTH", "N/A")
CustomField.label: State to Region Mapping
